# chenterry.com — LLM Full Index

Canonical: https://chenterry.com/llms-full.txt
Site: https://chenterry.com/

This file is the expanded index for agents. It lists high-signal essays by theme with one-line descriptions and canonical URLs.

## Key Thesis Posts
- PM for Agents: Turning Audience Insight Into Agent-Ready Specs — Core thesis: preserve user intent from social signal to executable tasks for coding agents. https://chenterry.com/posts/crowdlisten/
- Fine-Grained Social Listening for Understanding Crowd Conversations — Defines weighted conversation modeling and interpretive depth as durable product advantage. https://chenterry.com/posts/crowdlisten_human_signal/
- Building Has Become Easier — How Do We Fix Distribution? — Argues distribution intelligence is now the bottleneck for vibe-coded products. https://chenterry.com/posts/crowdlisten_distribution_intelligence/
- The Real-Time Feedback Layer — Reframes CrowdListen as an always-on feedback loop connecting audience reaction to product iteration. https://chenterry.com/posts/crowdlisten_feedback_layer/
- The Agent Economy Starts with Tasks. It Scales Through Attention. — Explains shift from human attention markets to agent-mediated discovery and AEO. https://chenterry.com/posts/crowdlisten_agentic_discovery/

## CrowdListen Posts
- Why People Care What Others Think — Foundational argument for crowd context as a decision substrate, not just social proof. https://chenterry.com/posts/crowd_thesis/
- Running a 1-Person Billion Dollar Company — Practical stack note on combining CrowdListen, coding agents, OpenClaw, and content systems. https://chenterry.com/posts/one-person-billion/
- From Raw Social Data to Real Research — Product framing on converting fragmented public discussion into PM-ready insight. https://chenterry.com/posts/crowdlisten/

## Foundational Posts
- When Knowledge Becomes Fluid: How AI Transforms Learning — On adaptive knowledge interfaces, synthesis, and tradeoffs between frictionless and durable learning. https://chenterry.com/posts/fluid-knowledge-ai-transforms-learning/
- Generation Is Easy. Distribution Is Hard. — Early thesis on why deployment and attention capture dominate post-generation value. https://chenterry.com/posts/generation_distribution/
- Intent-Driven Discovery in the AI Era — Positioning argument for moving from query matching to intent-level discovery systems. https://chenterry.com/posts/intent_driven_discovery/
- The Essence of Creativity in the Age of AI — Frames creativity as judgment and recombination under abundance, not raw output volume. https://chenterry.com/posts/essense_of_creativity/
- Building Agent Prototypes in Ambiguity — Practical lens for shipping agent workflows under uncertainty without overfitting process too early. https://chenterry.com/posts/agent_prototyping/

## Navigation
- Posts index: https://chenterry.com/posts/
- About: https://chenterry.com/about/
- Product: https://chenterry.com/product/
